title: ego trip
body:
we're all strangers in a strange land
cuz danger is the mainland
of course we stay lost at sea until we hungry
cuz off the ship the sharks start hunting
i'm thirsty  all the time
mind brined in salt water
i'm trying to find any fountain
youth truth
you sharing, what proof?
i'm looking for a mountain spring i can jump off
cuz i'd rather drink the world's run off than run off the edge
my life is a one off and then the skin slough off again
